en: Zedekiah was twenty-one years old when he became king; and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem. His mother's name was Hamutal the daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah.
zh: 西底家登基的時候是二十一歲，他在耶路撒冷作王十一年；他母親名叫哈慕他，是立拿人耶利米的女兒。

en: And he did what was evil in the sight of the LORD, according to all that Jehoiakim had done.
zh: 他行耶和華眼中看為惡的事，像約雅敬一切所行的。

en: For because of the anger of the LORD things came to the point in Jerusalem and Judah that he cast them out from his presence. And Zedekiah rebelled against the king of Babylon.
zh: 因為耶和華的怒氣向耶路撒冷和猶大發作，直到他把他們從自己的面前趕走。後來，西底家背叛了巴比倫王。

en: And in the ninth year of his reign, in the tenth month, on the tenth day of the month, Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon came with all his army against Jerusalem, and laid siege to it. And they built siegeworks all around it.
zh: 西底家作王第九年十月十日，巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒率領他的全軍來攻打耶路撒冷；他們在城外安營，又在四周築壘攻城。

en: So the city was besieged till the eleventh year of King Zedekiah.
zh: 於是，城被圍困，直到西底家王第十一年。

en: On the ninth day of the fourth month the famine was so severe in the city that there was no food for the people of the land.
zh: 四月九日，城裡饑荒非常嚴重，甚至那地的人民都斷了糧食。

en: Then a breach was made in the city, and all the men of war fled and went out from the city by night by the way of a gate between the two walls, by the king's garden, while the Chaldeans were around the city. And they went in the direction of the Arabah.
zh: 城終於被攻破了，所有的戰士就在夜間從靠近王的花園的兩牆中間的那門，逃跑出城。那時迦勒底人在四圍攻城；他們就往亞拉巴的方向逃走。

en: But the army of the Chaldeans pursued the king and overtook Zedekiah in the plains of Jericho. And all his army was scattered from him.
zh: 迦勒底人的軍隊追趕，在耶利哥的原野上把西底家追上了；他的全軍都離開他四散了。

en: Then they captured the king and brought him up to the king of Babylon at Riblah in the land of Hamath, and he passed sentence on him.
zh: 他們把王擒住，把他解到哈馬地的利比拉巴比倫王那裡；他就宣判他的罪。

en: The king of Babylon slaughtered the sons of Zedekiah before his eyes, and also slaughtered all the officials of Judah at Riblah.
zh: 巴比倫王在利比拉，當著西底家眼前殺了他的眾子，也殺了猶大所有的領袖，

en: He put out the eyes of Zedekiah, and bound him in chains, and the king of Babylon took him to Babylon, and put him in prison till the day of his death.
zh: 並且把西底家的眼睛弄瞎，然後用銅鍊鎖住他。巴比倫王把他帶到巴比倫去，關在牢裡，直到他去世的日子。

en: In the fifth month, on the tenth day of the month- that was the nineteenth year of King Nebuchadnezzar, king of Babylon- Nebuzaradan the captain of the bodyguard, who served the king of Babylon, entered Jerusalem.
zh: 五月十日，就是巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒第十九年，侍立在巴比倫王面前的護衛長尼布撒拉旦來到耶路撒冷。

en: And he burned the house of the LORD, and the king's house and all the houses of Jerusalem; every great house he burned down.
zh: 他放火焚燒耶和華的殿和王宮，以及耶路撒冷一切房屋，一切高大的房屋，他都放火燒了。

en: And all the army of the Chaldeans, who were with the captain of the guard, broke down all the walls around Jerusalem.
zh: 跟隨護衛長的迦勒底人全軍拆毀了耶路撒冷周圍所有的城牆。

en: And Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard carried away captive some of the poorest of the people and the rest of the people who were left in the city and the deserters who had deserted to the king of Babylon, together with the rest of the artisans.
zh: 至於人民中最貧窮的、城中剩下的人民，和已經向巴比倫王投降的人，以及剩下的技工，護衛長尼布撒拉旦都擄了去。

en: But Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard left some of the poorest of the land to be vinedressers and plowmen.
zh: 至於那地最貧窮的人，護衛長尼布撒拉旦把他們留下，去修理葡萄園和耕種田地。

en: And the pillars of bronze that were in the house of the LORD, and the stands and the bronze sea that were in the house of the LORD, the Chaldeans broke in pieces, and carried all the bronze to Babylon.
zh: 耶和華殿的銅柱，以及耶和華殿的銅座和銅海，迦勒底人都打碎了，把所有的銅都運到巴比倫去。

en: And they took away the pots and the shovels and the snuffers and the basins and the dishes for incense and all the vessels of bronze used in the temple service;
zh: 他們又把鍋、鏟子、燭剪、碗、碟子，和敬拜用的一切銅器都拿去了。

en: also the small bowls and the fire pans and the basins and the pots and the lampstands and the dishes for incense and the bowls for drink offerings. What was of gold the captain of the guard took away as gold, and what was of silver, as silver.
zh: 此外，碗盆、火鼎、碗、鍋、燈臺、碟子和奠酒的爵，無論是金的或是銀的，護衛長都拿去了。

en: As for the two pillars, the one sea, the twelve bronze bulls that were under the sea, and the stands, which Solomon the king had made for the house of the LORD, the bronze of all these things was beyond weight.
zh: 所羅門王為耶和華的殿所做的兩根銅柱、一個銅海、銅海下面的十二頭銅牛，和十個銅座，這一切器皿的銅，重得無法可稱。

en: As for the pillars, the height of the one pillar was eighteen cubits, its circumference was twelve cubits, and its thickness was four fingers, and it was hollow.
zh: 至於那些柱子，每根高八公尺，圓周是五公尺三公分，柱子是空心的。銅的厚度有七十五公釐。

en: On it was a capital of bronze. The height of the one capital was five cubits. A network and pomegranates, all of bronze, were around the capital. And the second pillar had the same, with pomegranates.
zh: 柱上有銅柱頭，柱頭高兩公尺三十公分，柱頭四周有網子和石榴都是銅的；另一根柱子同樣也有石榴。

en: There were ninety-six pomegranates on the sides; all the pomegranates were a hundred upon the network all around.
zh: 每個網子周圍共有一百個石榴，明顯可見的有九十六個。

en: And the captain of the guard took Seraiah the chief priest, and Zephaniah the second priest, and the three keepers of the threshold;
zh: 護衛長拿住祭司長西萊雅、副祭司長西番亞和三個守門的；

en: and from the city he took an officer who had been in command of the men of war, and seven men of the king's council, who were found in the city; and the secretary of the commander of the army who mustered the people of the land; and sixty men of the people of the land, who were found in the midst of the city.
zh: 又從城裡拿住一個管理軍兵的官長，並且在城裡搜獲常見王面的七個人，和一個負責召募當地人民的軍長書記，又在城中搜獲六十個當地的人民。

en: And Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard took them and brought them to the king of Babylon at Riblah.
zh: 護衛長尼布撒拉旦把他們拿住，帶到利比拉巴比倫王那裡。

en: And the king of Babylon struck them down, and put them to death at Riblah in the land of Hamath. So Judah was taken into exile out of its land.
zh: 巴比倫王擊打他們，在哈馬地的利比拉把他們處死。這樣，猶大人被擄，離開了他們的國土。

en: This is the number of the people whom Nebuchadnezzar carried away captive: in the seventh year, 3,023 Judeans;
zh: 以下是尼布甲尼撒擄去的人民的數目：在他執政第七年，有猶大人三千零二十三名；

en: in the eighteenth year of Nebuchadnezzar he carried away captive from Jerusalem 832 persons;
zh: 尼布甲尼撒第十八年，從耶路撒冷擄去的，有八百三十二人；

en: in the twenty-third year of Nebuchadnezzar, Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard carried away captive of the Judeans 745 persons; all the persons were 4,600.
zh: 尼布甲尼撒第二十三年，護衛長尼布撒拉旦擄去猶大人七百四十五名。總數是四千六百人。

en: And in the thirty-seventh year of the exile of Jehoiachin king of Judah, in the twelfth month, on the twenty-fifth day of the month, Evil-merodach king of Babylon, in the year that he became king, lifted up the head of Jehoiachin king of Judah and brought him out of prison.
zh: 猶大王約雅斤被擄後第三十七年，就是巴比倫王以未．米羅達登基的那一年，十二月二十五日，他恩待 猶大王約雅斤，把他從獄中領出來，

en: And he spoke kindly to him, and gave him a seat above the seats of the kings who were with him in Babylon.
zh: 並且安慰他，使他的地位高過和他一起在巴比倫的眾王。

en: So Jehoiachin put off his prison garments. And every day of his life he dined regularly at the king's table,
zh: 又換下他的囚衣，賜他終生常在王面前吃飯。

en: and for his allowance, a regular allowance was given him by the king according to his daily need, until the day of his death as long as he lived.
zh: 他的生活費用，在他一生的年日中，每日不斷由巴比倫王供應，直到他去世的日子。
